nasb.text: Now Jeremiah was still coming in and going out among the people, for they had not yet put him in the prison.

esv.text: Now Jeremiah was still going in and out among the people, for he had not yet been put in prison.

cnv.text: 那時，耶利米還可以在民眾中間自由行動，因為他們還沒有把他關進監獄裡。

ccb.text: 当时，耶利米还可以自由来往，没有被他们囚在狱中。
